mechanism: A MOVE spike to 140+ simultaneously increases basis trade margin requirements (triggering unwinds at $800B-$1T notional) AND widens CLO AAA spreads past SOFR+200 (killing CLO arbitrage). The shared MOVE trigger creates a common factor linking two ostensibly independent fragility channels.
regime_dependence: Active while both basis trade and CLO channels are at current scale; BoJ-maturity wall timing overlap (Japanese holders of 20-30% CLO AAA tranches) could amplify during H2 2026-H1 2028
